update_topic.title: Re-evaluating Wiki and Documentation Infrastructure
update_topic.summary: Evaluated MkDocs vs Hugo and decided on MkDocs with Material theme for wiki documentation.

update_topic.title: Scaffolding the GitHub Pages Site
update_topic.summary: Set up MkDocs, created proper directory structure, and implemented automation to generate profile from markdown.

update_topic.title: Migrating to ProperDocs and Configuring Redirects
update_topic.summary: Migrated from standard MkDocs to ProperDocs due to MkDocs 2.0 breaking changes. Configured mkdocs-redirects.

update_topic.title: Defining the 'Bare Metal' Design System
update_topic.summary: Created a central CSS theme for the Bare Metal aesthetic and applied it to the ProperDocs setup.

update_topic.title: Creating Site Configuration Documentation
update_topic.summary: Built config.md and compiled it to a private .source/config.html to securely store the CSS variables reference.

update_topic.title: Analyzing Project Architecture
update_topic.summary: Ran understand skill to generate a knowledge graph of the repository in .understand-anything/knowledge-graph.json

update_topic.title: Project Refactoring Complete
update_topic.summary: Refactored all documentation pages using MkDocs Material admonitions and the Bare Metal terminal aesthetic.

update_topic.title: Configuring GitHub Pages Deployment Workflow
update_topic.summary: Created a GitHub Actions workflow to deploy the site from main as a static artifact. Used GitHub API to force build_type to workflow.

update_topic.title: Meta-Optimizer: Refining Deployment Heuristics
update_topic.summary: Updated global GEMINI.md memory with heuristics to use GitHub Actions for User Pages instead of gh-pages branch. Cleaned up legacy branches.
